channel.title: easy-vegan-posts Posts - RSS Feed
channel.description: Fresh easy-vegan-posts posts and cooking inspiration

item.title: Vegan Berry Protein Smoothie Bowls with Superfood Toppings for a Nutritious Boost
item.description: These vibrant vegan berry smoothie bowls pack a protein punch with plant-based protein powder and are topped with nutrient-rich superfoods. A refreshing, energizing breakfast or post-workout treat that feels like a little celebration in a bowl.
item.dc:creator: author_001
item.content:encoded:
⏱️ Prep Time: 15 minutes

🍳 Cook Time: 0 minutes

⏰ Total Time: N/A minutes

🍽️ Servings: 2

📊 Difficulty: Easy

🥘 Ingredients

  • 1 cup frozen mixed berries
  • 1 frozen banana
  • 1 cup unsweetened almond milk
  • 2 scoops vegan protein powder (vanilla or berry flavor)
  • 1 tablespoon chia seeds
  • 1 tablespoon hemp seeds
  • 1 tablespoon shredded coconut
  • 1/4 cup fresh berries (for topping)
  • 1 tablespoon pumpkin seeds (for topping)
  • 1 teaspoon goji berries (optional topping)

👩‍🍳 Instructions

📌 Pinterest Tags: #cat1761230119510 #Easypost #quickpost #30minutemeals #post #cooking #foodie #homemade #delicious #frozen #unsweetened

📌 Save this post to Pinterest!

Perfect for meal planning and sharing with friends

media:content.media:title: Vegan Berry Protein Smoothie Bowls with Superfood Toppings for a Nutritious Boost
media:content.media:description: These vibrant vegan berry smoothie bowls pack a protein punch with plant-based protein powder and are topped with nutrient-rich superfoods. A refreshing, energizing breakfast or post-workout treat that feels like a little celebration in a bowl.

media:group.media:keywords: cat1761230119510, Easypost, quickpost, 30minutemeals, post, cooking, foodie, homemade, delicious, frozen, unsweetened

item.title: Vegan Healthy Smoothie Bowls with Avocado and Spinach: A Nourishing Start to Your Day
item.description: These creamy vegan smoothie bowls blend avocado and spinach for a nutrient-packed breakfast or snack. The secret? Using ripe avocado for smooth texture and fresh spinach for vibrant color. Perfect when you want a quick, wholesome boost!
item.dc:creator: author_001
item.content:encoded:
⏱️ Prep Time: 15 minutes

🍳 Cook Time: 0 minutes

⏰ Total Time: N/A minutes

🍽️ Servings: 2

📊 Difficulty: Easy

🥘 Ingredients

  • 1 ripe avocado, peeled and pitted
  • 2 cups fresh spinach leaves, washed
  • 1 frozen banana, sliced
  • 1 cup unsweetened almond milk
  • 1 tablespoon chia seeds
  • 1 teaspoon maple syrup (optional)
  • Fresh berries and sliced almonds for topping

👩‍🍳 Instructions

📌 Pinterest Tags: #cat1761230119510 #Easypost #quickpost #30minutemeals #post #cooking #foodie #homemade #delicious #avocado #fresh #frozen

📌 Save this post to Pinterest!

Perfect for meal planning and sharing with friends

media:content.media:title: Vegan Healthy Smoothie Bowls with Avocado and Spinach: A Nourishing Start to Your Day
media:content.media:description: These creamy vegan smoothie bowls blend avocado and spinach for a nutrient-packed breakfast or snack. The secret? Using ripe avocado for smooth texture and fresh spinach for vibrant color. Perfect when you want a quick, wholesome boost!

media:group.media:keywords: cat1761230119510, Easypost, quickpost, 30minutemeals, post, cooking, foodie, homemade, delicious, avocado, fresh, frozen

item.title: Fluffy Vegan Banana Pancakes with Maple Syrup That Everyone Will Love
item.description: These vegan banana pancakes are light, fluffy, and naturally sweetened with ripe bananas. The secret? Aquafaba whips up the batter perfectly. Great for lazy weekend brunches or anytime you crave a comforting treat.
item.dc:creator: author_001
item.content:encoded:
⏱️ Prep Time: 15 minutes

🍳 Cook Time: 15 minutes

⏰ Total Time: N/A minutes

🍽️ Servings: 4

📊 Difficulty: Easy

🥘 Ingredients

  • 1 cup all-purpose flour (sifted)
  • 2 tablespoons sugar (optional)
  • 1 tablespoon baking powder
  • 1/4 teaspoon salt
  • 1 cup plant-based milk (almond, soy, or oat)
  • 3/4 cup ripe mashed bananas (about 2 medium bananas)
  • 3 tablespoons aquafaba (chickpea brine)
  • 1 teaspoon vanilla extract
  • 2 tablespoons coconut oil (melted) plus extra for cooking
  • Pure maple syrup for serving

👩‍🍳 Instructions

📌 Pinterest Tags: #cat1761230119510 #Easypost #quickpost #30minutemeals #post #cooking #foodie #homemade #delicious #allpurpose #sugar #tablespoon

📌 Save this post to Pinterest!

Perfect for meal planning and sharing with friends

media:content.media:title: Fluffy Vegan Banana Pancakes with Maple Syrup That Everyone Will Love
media:content.media:description: These vegan banana pancakes are light, fluffy, and naturally sweetened with ripe bananas. The secret? Aquafaba whips up the batter perfectly. Great for lazy weekend brunches or anytime you crave a comforting treat.

media:group.media:keywords: cat1761230119510, Easypost, quickpost, 30minutemeals, post, cooking, foodie, homemade, delicious, allpurpose, sugar, tablespoon

item.title: Easy Spring Nail Ideas You Can Do at Home for Fresh, Fun Looks
item.description: Brighten up your spring with these easy nail ideas you can do right at home. From pastel hues to floral accents, these looks are simple, fun, and perfect for freshening up your style this season.
item.dc:creator: author_001
item.content:encoded:
⏱️ Prep Time: 15 minutes

🍳 Cook Time: 0 minutes

⏰ Total Time: N/A minutes

🍽️ Servings: 1

📊 Difficulty: Easy

🥘 Ingredients

  • Base coat nail polish, clear, 1 thin layer
  • Pastel nail polish colors (pink, lavender, mint, yellow), 1-2 coats each
  • Top coat nail polish, clear, 1 thin layer
  • Nail art tools (dotting tool, thin brush) or toothpicks
  • Optional: small floral nail stickers or decals

👩‍🍳 Instructions

📌 Pinterest Tags: #cat1761230119510 #Easypost #quickpost #30minutemeals #post #cooking #foodie #homemade #delicious #polish #pastel

📌 Save this post to Pinterest!

Perfect for meal planning and sharing with friends

media:content.media:title: Easy Spring Nail Ideas You Can Do at Home for Fresh, Fun Looks
media:content.media:description: Brighten up your spring with these easy nail ideas you can do right at home. From pastel hues to floral accents, these looks are simple, fun, and perfect for freshening up your style this season.

media:group.media:keywords: cat1761230119510, Easypost, quickpost, 30minutemeals, post, cooking, foodie, homemade, delicious, polish, pastel

item.title: Fast and Easy Vegan Spring Pea and Mint Soup That Refreshes Instantly
item.description: This vibrant vegan pea and mint soup is a fresh burst of spring in a bowl. It’s quick to whip up thanks to frozen peas and fresh mint, making it perfect for a light lunch or a starter on a sunny day.
item.dc:creator: author_001
item.content:encoded:
⏱️ Prep Time: 15 minutes

🍳 Cook Time: 15 minutes

⏰ Total Time: N/A minutes

🍽️ Servings: 4

📊 Difficulty: Easy

🥘 Ingredients

  • 1 tablespoon olive oil, extra virgin
  • 1 medium onion, finely chopped
  • 2 cloves garlic, minced
  • 4 cups frozen green peas
  • 3 cups vegetable broth, low sodium
  • 1/4 cup fresh mint leaves, chopped
  • Salt to taste
  • Freshly ground black pepper to taste
  • Juice of half a lemon
  • Optional: coconut cream or plant-based yogurt for garnish

👩‍🍳 Instructions

📌 Pinterest Tags: #cat1761230119510 #Easypost #quickpost #30minutemeals #post #cooking #foodie #homemade #delicious #tablespoon #medium #cloves

📌 Save this post to Pinterest!

Perfect for meal planning and sharing with friends

media:content.media:title: Fast and Easy Vegan Spring Pea and Mint Soup That Refreshes Instantly
media:content.media:description: This vibrant vegan pea and mint soup is a fresh burst of spring in a bowl. It’s quick to whip up thanks to frozen peas and fresh mint, making it perfect for a light lunch or a starter on a sunny day.

media:group.media:keywords: cat1761230119510, Easypost, quickpost, 30minutemeals, post, cooking, foodie, homemade, delicious, tablespoon, medium, cloves

item.title: Fast and Healthy Vegan Tofu Stir-Fry with Spring Greens That You'll Love
item.description: This vibrant tofu stir-fry is packed with fresh spring greens and a tangy sauce that makes it both healthy and satisfying. The secret? Pressing the tofu well to get that perfect crispy texture. Great for a quick weekday dinner!
item.dc:creator: author_001
item.content:encoded:
⏱️ Prep Time: 15 minutes

🍳 Cook Time: 15 minutes

⏰ Total Time: N/A minutes

🍽️ Servings: 4

📊 Difficulty: Easy

🥘 Ingredients

  • 14 oz firm tofu, pressed and cubed
  • 2 cups spring greens (spinach, bok choy, or kale), chopped
  • 1 red bell pepper, thinly sliced
  • 2 cloves garlic, minced
  • 1 tablespoon fresh ginger, grated
  • 2 tablespoons soy sauce or tamari
  • 1 tablespoon sesame oil
  • 1 teaspoon maple syrup or agave nectar
  • 1 tablespoon rice vinegar
  • 1 tablespoon vegetable oil for frying
  • 1 teaspoon toasted sesame seeds (optional)
  • Salt and pepper to taste

👩‍🍳 Instructions

📌 Pinterest Tags: #cat1761230119510 #Easypost #quickpost #30minutemeals #post #cooking #foodie #homemade #delicious #pressed #spring #pepper

📌 Save this post to Pinterest!

Perfect for meal planning and sharing with friends

media:content.media:title: Fast and Healthy Vegan Tofu Stir-Fry with Spring Greens That You'll Love
media:content.media:description: This vibrant tofu stir-fry is packed with fresh spring greens and a tangy sauce that makes it both healthy and satisfying. The secret? Pressing the tofu well to get that perfect crispy texture. Great for a quick weekday dinner!

media:group.media:keywords: cat1761230119510, Easypost, quickpost, 30minutemeals, post, cooking, foodie, homemade, delicious, pressed, spring, pepper

item.title: 30-Minute Easy Vegan Chickpea Curry with Fresh Spring Veggies
item.description: This vegan chickpea curry is a quick, vibrant meal bursting with fresh spring veggies and warming spices. It’s perfect for a busy weeknight when you want something wholesome and comforting without fuss.
item.dc:creator: author_001
item.content:encoded:
⏱️ Prep Time: 15 minutes

🍳 Cook Time: 30 minutes

⏰ Total Time: N/A minutes

🍽️ Servings: 4

📊 Difficulty: Easy

🥘 Ingredients

  • 2 tablespoons coconut oil, melted
  • 1 medium onion, finely chopped
  • 3 cloves garlic, minced
  • 1 tablespoon fresh ginger, grated
  • 2 teaspoons ground cumin
  • 2 teaspoons ground coriander
  • 1 teaspoon turmeric powder
  • 1 teaspoon garam masala
  • 1/4 teaspoon cayenne pepper (optional)
  • 1 can (14 oz) diced tomatoes
  • 1 can (15 oz) chickpeas, drained and rinsed
  • 1 cup vegetable broth
  • 1 cup fresh green peas
  • 1 cup chopped asparagus, cut into 1-inch pieces
  • 1 cup chopped baby spinach
  • Salt and pepper, to taste
  • Juice of 1/2 lemon
  • Fresh cilantro, chopped (for garnish)

👩‍🍳 Instructions

📌 Pinterest Tags: #cat1761230119510 #Easypost #1hourmeals #post #cooking #foodie #homemade #delicious #coconut #medium #cloves

📌 Save this post to Pinterest!

Perfect for meal planning and sharing with friends

media:content.media:title: 30-Minute Easy Vegan Chickpea Curry with Fresh Spring Veggies
media:content.media:description: This vegan chickpea curry is a quick, vibrant meal bursting with fresh spring veggies and warming spices. It’s perfect for a busy weeknight when you want something wholesome and comforting without fuss.

media:group.media:keywords: cat1761230119510, Easypost, 1hourmeals, post, cooking, foodie, homemade, delicious, coconut, medium, cloves

item.title: Easy Vegan Spring Chickpea Salad with Creamy Avocado Dressing
item.description: This vibrant vegan chickpea salad bursts with fresh spring veggies and a luscious avocado dressing that’s both creamy and tangy. It’s super quick to whip up and perfect for a light lunch or picnic!
item.dc:creator: author_001
item.content:encoded:
⏱️ Prep Time: 15 minutes

🍳 Cook Time: 0 minutes

⏰ Total Time: N/A minutes

🍽️ Servings: 4

📊 Difficulty: Easy

🥘 Ingredients

  • 1 can (15 oz) chickpeas, drained and rinsed
  • 1 cup cherry tomatoes, halved
  • 1 small cucumber, diced
  • 1/2 red onion, finely chopped
  • 1/4 cup fresh parsley, chopped
  • 1 ripe avocado
  • 2 tablespoons fresh lemon juice
  • 1 tablespoon olive oil
  • 1 garlic clove, minced
  • Salt and black pepper, to taste
  • Optional: 1 teaspoon maple syrup or agave for sweetness

👩‍🍳 Instructions

📌 Pinterest Tags: #cat1761230119510 #Easypost #quickpost #30minutemeals #post #cooking #foodie #homemade #delicious #chickpeas #cherry #small

📌 Save this post to Pinterest!

Perfect for meal planning and sharing with friends

media:content.media:title: Easy Vegan Spring Chickpea Salad with Creamy Avocado Dressing
media:content.media:description: This vibrant vegan chickpea salad bursts with fresh spring veggies and a luscious avocado dressing that’s both creamy and tangy. It’s super quick to whip up and perfect for a light lunch or picnic!

item.title: Easy Vegan Spring Vegetable Soup With Fresh Herbs for Light, Healthy Meals
item.description: This fresh vegan spring soup bursts with tender veggies and fragrant herbs. The secret? A splash of lemon juice brightens it all up. Great for a light lunch or cozy dinner on a cool day.
item.dc:creator: author_001
item.content:encoded:
⏱️ Prep Time: 15 minutes

🍳 Cook Time: 30 minutes

⏰ Total Time: N/A minutes

🍽️ Servings: 4

📊 Difficulty: Easy

🥘 Ingredients

  • 2 tablespoons olive oil, cold-pressed
  • 1 medium onion, diced
  • 2 cloves garlic, minced
  • 3 cups vegetable broth, low sodium
  • 1 cup asparagus tips, chopped
  • 1 cup sugar snap peas, trimmed
  • 1 cup baby carrots, sliced
  • 1 medium potato, peeled and diced
  • 1/2 cup fresh parsley, chopped
  • 1/4 cup fresh dill, chopped
  • 1/4 cup fresh chives, chopped
  • Juice of 1 lemon
  • Salt and pepper, to taste

👩‍🍳 Instructions

📌 Pinterest Tags: #cat1761230119510 #Easypost #1hourmeals #post #cooking #foodie #homemade #delicious #olive #medium #cloves

📌 Save this post to Pinterest!

media:content.media:description: This fresh vegan spring soup bursts with tender veggies and fragrant herbs. The secret? A splash of lemon juice brightens it all up. Great for a light lunch or cozy dinner on a cool day.

item.title: Best Easy Vegan Spring Tofu Stir-Fry with Greens That Tastes Like a Dream
item.description: This vibrant vegan stir-fry brings fresh spring greens and crispy tofu together in a quick, flavorful meal. The secret? A tangy tamari-lime sauce that brightens every bite. Perfect for a light weeknight dinner!
item.dc:creator: author_001
item.content:encoded:
⏱️ Prep Time: 15 minutes

🍳 Cook Time: 15 minutes

⏰ Total Time: N/A minutes

🍽️ Servings: 4

📊 Difficulty: Easy

🥘 Ingredients

  • 14 oz firm tofu, pressed and cubed
  • 2 tablespoons tamari or soy sauce
  • 1 tablespoon sesame oil
  • 2 cloves garlic, minced
  • 1 inch piece ginger, grated
  • 1 bunch spring greens (like bok choy or baby kale), chopped
  • 1 cup snap peas, trimmed
  • 1 small red bell pepper, sliced thin
  • 1 tablespoon lime juice
  • 1 teaspoon maple syrup
  • 1/4 cup vegetable broth or water
  • 2 green onions, sliced
  • 1 tablespoon toasted sesame seeds

👩‍🍳 Instructions

📌 Pinterest Tags: #cat1761230119510 #Easypost #quickpost #30minutemeals #post #cooking #foodie #homemade #delicious #pressed #tamari #tablespoon

📌 Save this post to Pinterest!

Perfect for meal planning and sharing with friends

media:content.media:title: Best Easy Vegan Spring Tofu Stir-Fry with Greens That Tastes Like a Dream
media:content.media:description: This vibrant vegan stir-fry brings fresh spring greens and crispy tofu together in a quick, flavorful meal. The secret? A tangy tamari-lime sauce that brightens every bite. Perfect for a light weeknight dinner!

media:group.media:keywords: cat1761230119510, Easypost, quickpost, 30minutemeals, post, cooking, foodie, homemade, delicious, pressed, tamari, tablespoon

item.title: Best Creamy Vegan Coconut Curry with Spring Vegetables That Wows Every Time
item.description: This vegan coconut curry bursts with fresh spring veggies and silky coconut milk for a creamy, comforting bowl. The trick? Toasting the spices first to unlock deep flavor. Perfect for a cozy weeknight dinner!
item.dc:creator: author_001
item.content:encoded:
⏱️ Prep Time: 15 minutes

🍳 Cook Time: 30 minutes

⏰ Total Time: N/A minutes

🍽️ Servings: 4

📊 Difficulty: Easy

🥘 Ingredients

  • 2 tablespoons coconut oil, melted
  • 1 medium onion, finely chopped
  • 3 cloves garlic, minced
  • 1 tablespoon fresh ginger, grated
  • 2 teaspoons curry powder
  • 1 teaspoon ground turmeric
  • 1 teaspoon ground cumin
  • 1/2 teaspoon chili flakes (optional)
  • 1 can (14 oz) full-fat coconut milk
  • 1 cup vegetable broth
  • 1 medium carrot, sliced
  • 1 cup snap peas, trimmed
  • 1 cup asparagus, cut into 2-inch pieces
  • 1 cup baby spinach leaves
  • 1 tablespoon fresh lime juice
  • Salt and pepper to taste
  • Fresh cilantro, chopped (for garnish)
  • Cooked jasmine rice or naan bread, to serve

👩‍🍳 Instructions

📌 Pinterest Tags: #cat1761230119510 #Easypost #1hourmeals #post #cooking #foodie #homemade #delicious #coconut #medium #cloves

📌 Save this post to Pinterest!

Perfect for meal planning and sharing with friends

media:content.media:title: Best Creamy Vegan Coconut Curry with Spring Vegetables That Wows Every Time
media:content.media:description: This vegan coconut curry bursts with fresh spring veggies and silky coconut milk for a creamy, comforting bowl. The trick? Toasting the spices first to unlock deep flavor. Perfect for a cozy weeknight dinner!

media:group.media:keywords: cat1761230119510, Easypost, 1hourmeals, post, cooking, foodie, homemade, delicious, coconut, medium, cloves

item.title: Easy Vegan Spring Rolls With Fresh Herbs and Veggies That Refresh and Delight
item.description: These vegan spring rolls are light, fresh, and packed with crisp veggies and fragrant herbs. The rice paper wrapping keeps things delicate yet satisfying. Perfect for a healthy lunch or appetizer on a sunny day!
item.dc:creator: author_001
item.content:encoded:
⏱️ Prep Time: 15 minutes

🍳 Cook Time: 0 minutes

⏰ Total Time: N/A minutes

🍽️ Servings: 4

📊 Difficulty: Easy

🥘 Ingredients

  • 8 rice paper wrappers
  • 1 cup shredded carrots, fresh
  • 1 cup thinly sliced cucumber
  • 1 cup red bell pepper, thinly sliced
  • 1 cup fresh mint leaves
  • 1 cup fresh cilantro leaves
  • 1 cup fresh basil leaves
  • 1 avocado, sliced
  • 1 cup cooked vermicelli noodles (optional)
  • 1/4 cup hoisin sauce for dipping
  • 1/4 cup peanut sauce for dipping

👩‍🍳 Instructions

📌 Pinterest Tags: #cat1761230119510 #Easypost #quickpost #30minutemeals #post #cooking #foodie #homemade #delicious #paper #shredded #thinly

📌 Save this post to Pinterest!

Perfect for meal planning and sharing with friends

media:content.media:description: These vegan spring rolls are light, fresh, and packed with crisp veggies and fragrant herbs. The rice paper wrapping keeps things delicate yet satisfying. Perfect for a healthy lunch or appetizer on a sunny day!

item.title: Easy 30-Minute Vegan Stir-Fry with Tofu and Greens That Tastes Like a Takeout Favorite
item.description: This vibrant vegan stir-fry comes together in just half an hour, packing fresh greens and crispy tofu in a savory sauce. I love how the quick marination gives the tofu a punch of flavor. Perfect for a busy weeknight dinner!
item.dc:creator: author_001
item.content:encoded:
⏱️ Prep Time: 15 minutes

🍳 Cook Time: 15 minutes

⏰ Total Time: N/A minutes

🍽️ Servings: 4

📊 Difficulty: Easy

🥘 Ingredients

  • 14 oz extra-firm tofu, pressed and cubed
  • 2 tablespoons soy sauce or tamari
  • 1 tablespoon maple syrup
  • 1 tablespoon rice vinegar
  • 2 tablespoons vegetable oil, divided
  • 3 cloves garlic, minced
  • 1 tablespoon fresh ginger, grated
  • 1 red bell pepper, thinly sliced
  • 4 cups mixed greens (bok choy, spinach, kale), chopped
  • 1 medium carrot, julienned
  • 2 green onions, sliced
  • 1 teaspoon toasted sesame oil
  • 1 tablespoon sesame seeds (optional)
  • Cooked rice or noodles, to serve

👩‍🍳 Instructions

📌 Pinterest Tags: #cat1761230119510 #Easypost #quickpost #30minutemeals #post #cooking #foodie #homemade #delicious #extrafirm #sauce #tablespoon

📌 Save this post to Pinterest!

Perfect for meal planning and sharing with friends

media:content.media:title: Easy 30-Minute Vegan Stir-Fry with Tofu and Greens That Tastes Like a Takeout Favorite
media:content.media:description: This vibrant vegan stir-fry comes together in just half an hour, packing fresh greens and crispy tofu in a savory sauce. I love how the quick marination gives the tofu a punch of flavor. Perfect for a busy weeknight dinner!

media:group.media:keywords: cat1761230119510, Easypost, quickpost, 30minutemeals, post, cooking, foodie, homemade, delicious, extrafirm, sauce, tablespoon

item.title: Easy Vegan Spring Roll Bowls with Creamy Peanut Dipping Sauce
item.description: These vegan spring roll bowls are fresh, crunchy, and packed with vibrant veggies. The creamy peanut sauce adds a rich, nutty twist that makes every bite pop. Great for a light lunch or casual dinner!
item.dc:creator: author_001
item.content:encoded:
⏱️ Prep Time: 15 minutes

🍳 Cook Time: 10 minutes

⏰ Total Time: N/A minutes

🍽️ Servings: 4

📊 Difficulty: Easy

🥘 Ingredients

  • 1 cup cooked rice noodles, cooled
  • 1 cup shredded carrots, fresh
  • 1 cup thinly sliced cucumber
  • 1 cup shredded red cabbage
  • 1 cup bean sprouts, fresh
  • 1 avocado, sliced
  • 1/4 cup fresh cilantro leaves
  • 1/4 cup fresh mint leaves
  • 1/2 cup crushed peanuts
  • For the peanut sauce:
  • 1/4 cup creamy peanut butter
  • 2 tablespoons soy sauce or tamari
  • 1 tablespoon maple syrup
  • 1 tablespoon lime juice, fresh
  • 1 teaspoon grated fresh ginger
  • 1 clove garlic, minced
  • 2-3 tablespoons warm water, to thin

👩‍🍳 Instructions

📌 Pinterest Tags: #cat1761230119510 #Easypost #quickpost #30minutemeals #post #cooking #foodie #homemade #delicious #cooked #shredded #thinly

📌 Save this post to Pinterest!

media:content.media:description: These vegan spring roll bowls are fresh, crunchy, and packed with vibrant veggies. The creamy peanut sauce adds a rich, nutty twist that makes every bite pop. Great for a light lunch or casual dinner!

item.title: Fast and Flavorful Vegan Spring Buddha Bowl with Fresh Greens and Tangy Dressing
item.description: This vibrant vegan Buddha bowl is packed with fresh spring veggies and a zesty tahini dressing. It’s quick to make and perfect for a light lunch or dinner that feels nourishing and bright.
item.dc:creator: author_001
item.content:encoded:
⏱️ Prep Time: 15 minutes

🍳 Cook Time: 10 minutes

⏰ Total Time: N/A minutes

🍽️ Servings: 2

📊 Difficulty: Easy

🥘 Ingredients

  • 1 cup cooked quinoa, warm
  • 1 cup fresh spinach leaves
  • 1/2 cup shredded purple cabbage
  • 1/2 cup sliced cucumber
  • 1/2 cup grated carrot
  • 1/4 cup edamame, shelled and cooked
  • 1/4 cup sliced radishes
  • 2 tablespoons chopped fresh parsley
  • For the dressing:
  • 3 tablespoons tahini
  • 1 tablespoon lemon juice
  • 1 teaspoon maple syrup
  • 1 clove garlic, minced
  • 2 tablespoons water (to thin)
  • Salt and pepper to taste

👩‍🍳 Instructions

📌 Pinterest Tags: #cat1761230119510 #Easypost #quickpost #30minutemeals #post #cooking #foodie #homemade #delicious #cooked #fresh #shredded

item.title: Fast and Flavorful Vegan Spring Buddha Bowl for Fresh Healthy Meals
item.description: This vibrant vegan Buddha bowl bursts with fresh spring veggies and protein-rich chickpeas, making it a quick, nourishing meal. The tahini lemon dressing is the secret touch that ties all the flavors together perfectly. Great for lunch or a light dinner!
item.dc:creator: author_001
item.content:encoded:
⏱️ Prep Time: 15 minutes

🍳 Cook Time: 15 minutes

⏰ Total Time: N/A minutes

🍽️ Servings: 2

📊 Difficulty: Easy

🥘 Ingredients

  • 1 cup cooked chickpeas, drained and rinsed
  • 1 cup cooked quinoa, warm
  • 1 cup shredded kale, stems removed
  • 1/2 cup thinly sliced radishes
  • 1/2 cup grated carrot
  • 1/4 cup chopped cucumber
  • 1/4 cup chopped fresh parsley
  • 2 tablespoons tahini
  • 1 tablespoon fresh lemon juice
  • 1 teaspoon maple syrup
  • 1 clove garlic, minced
  • Salt and pepper to taste
  • 1 tablespoon olive oil

👩‍🍳 Instructions

Perfect for meal planning and sharing with friends

media:content.media:title: Fast and Flavorful Vegan Spring Buddha Bowl for Fresh Healthy Meals
media:content.media:description: This vibrant vegan Buddha bowl bursts with fresh spring veggies and protein-rich chickpeas, making it a quick, nourishing meal. The tahini lemon dressing is the secret touch that ties all the flavors together perfectly. Great for lunch or a light dinner!

media:group.media:keywords: cat1761230119510, Easypost, quickpost, 30minutemeals, post, cooking, foodie, homemade, delicious, cooked, shredded

item.title: Honey Balsamic Roasted Cabbage That Melts Perfectly in Your Mouth
item.description: This roasted cabbage is a game changer—sweet honey and tangy balsamic glaze caramelize the edges, making it melt in your mouth. A simple side that feels fancy, perfect alongside any cozy dinner.
item.dc:creator: author_001
item.content:encoded:
⏱️ Prep Time: 15 minutes

🍳 Cook Time: 40 minutes

⏰ Total Time: 55 minutes

🍽️ Servings: 4

📊 Difficulty: Easy

🥘 Ingredients

  • 1 medium green cabbage, cut into 1-inch thick wedges
  • 3 tablespoons olive oil, divided
  • 2 tablespoons balsamic vinegar
  • 1 tablespoon honey
  • 1 teaspoon salt
  • 1/2 teaspoon freshly ground black pepper
  • 1/2 teaspoon smoked paprika (optional)
  • Fresh parsley, chopped for garnish

👩‍🍳 Instructions

📌 Pinterest Tags: #cat1761230119510 #Easypost #1hourmeals #post #cooking #foodie #homemade #delicious #medium #olive #balsamic

📌 Save this post to Pinterest!

Perfect for meal planning and sharing with friends

media:content.media:description: This roasted cabbage is a game changer—sweet honey and tangy balsamic glaze caramelize the edges, making it melt in your mouth. A simple side that feels fancy, perfect alongside any cozy dinner.

item.title: Crispy Roasted Cabbage Steaks with Garlic Butter That Everyone Will Love
item.description: These cabbage steaks get perfectly crispy edges and melt-in-your-mouth centers thanks to a garlic butter glaze. Such an easy side that feels fancy enough for dinner guests or a cozy weeknight.
item.dc:creator: author_001
item.content:encoded:
⏱️ Prep Time: 15 minutes

🍳 Cook Time: 30 minutes

⏰ Total Time: 45 minutes

🍽️ Servings: 4

📊 Difficulty: Easy

🥘 Ingredients

  • 1 large green cabbage, sliced into 1-inch thick steaks
  • 4 tablespoons unsalted butter, melted
  • 3 cloves garlic, minced
  • 1 teaspoon smoked paprika
  • Salt and freshly ground black pepper, to taste
  • 2 tablespoons olive oil
  • Fresh parsley, chopped (optional, for garnish)

👩‍🍳 Instructions

📌 Pinterest Tags: #cat1761230119510 #Easypost #1hourmeals #post #cooking #foodie #homemade #delicious #large #unsalted #cloves

media:content.media:description: These cabbage steaks get perfectly crispy edges and melt-in-your-mouth centers thanks to a garlic butter glaze. Such an easy side that feels fancy enough for dinner guests or a cozy weeknight.

item.title: Fun and Tasty St. Patrick’s Day Rainbow Veggie Wraps Kids Will Adore
item.description: These colorful veggie wraps are a fun way to celebrate St. Patrick’s Day with the kids. Packed with fresh crunchy veggies and a creamy avocado spread, they’re perfect for lunch or a festive snack.
item.dc:creator: author_001
item.content:encoded:
⏱️ Prep Time: 15 minutes

🍳 Cook Time: 0 minutes

⏰ Total Time: 15 minutes

🍽️ Servings: 4

📊 Difficulty: Easy

🥘 Ingredients

  • 4 large whole wheat tortillas
  • 1 ripe avocado, peeled and mashed
  • 1 tablespoon fresh lemon juice
  • 1/2 teaspoon garlic powder
  • 1 cup shredded carrots
  • 1 cup thinly sliced cucumbers
  • 1 cup thinly sliced red bell pepper
  • 1 cup baby spinach leaves
  • Salt and pepper to taste

👩‍🍳 Instructions

📌 Pinterest Tags: #cat1761230119510 #Easypost #quickpost #30minutemeals #post #cooking #foodie #homemade #delicious #large #avocado #tablespoon

item.title: Delicious Protein Coffee Smoothie for a Healthy Boost
item.description: This protein coffee smoothie is a game-changer for busy mornings. Packed with nutrients and flavor, it's perfect for a quick breakfast or post-workout boost!
item.dc:creator: author_001
item.content:encoded:
⏱️ Prep Time: 10 minutes

🍳 Cook Time: 0 minutes

⏰ Total Time: 10 minutes

🍽️ Servings: 2

📊 Difficulty: Easy

🥘 Ingredients

  • 1 cup brewed coffee, cooled
  • 1 banana, frozen
  • 1/2 cup Greek yogurt
  • 1 scoop protein powder (vanilla or chocolate)
  • 1 tablespoon almond butter
  • 1 tablespoon honey or maple syrup (optional)
  • Ice cubes (optional, for thickness)

👩‍🍳 Instructions

📌 Pinterest Tags: #cat1761230119510 #Easypost #quickpost #30minutemeals #post #cooking #foodie #homemade #delicious #brewed #banana #greek

item.title: Creamy Cold Brew Coffee: Refreshing Mornings Made Easy
item.description: Start your day with this creamy cold brew coffee that combines smooth coffee with a hint of vanilla and sweetness. Perfect for warm mornings or a refreshing afternoon break, this beverage is easy to make and incredibly satisfying.
item.dc:creator: author_001
item.content:encoded:
⏱️ Prep Time: 10 minutes

🍳 Cook Time: 0 minutes

⏰ Total Time: 10 minutes

🍽️ Servings: 2

📊 Difficulty: Easy

🥘 Ingredients

  • 1 cup (240ml) cold brew coffee, brewed and chilled
  • 1/2 cup (120ml) milk or cream (dairy or non-dairy alternatives like almond or oat milk)
  • 1 tablespoon (15ml) vanilla syrup (adjust to taste)
  • Ice cubes

👩‍🍳 Instructions
